title: 'I-PAC A Means To Earn Money By Promoting Corruption': BJP Hits Out At TMC Ahead of Bengal Polls
description: West Bengal BJP candidate from the Kharagpur Sadar Assembly constituency, Dilip Ghosh, on Monday called the India Political Action Committee (I-PAC) a "means to promote corruption" in the State following the arrest of its director Vinesh Chandel in a money laundering case.
